title: cleome parviflora subsp. psoraleifolia
intro: Cleome parviflora subsp. psoraleifolia, also known as the spider flower or psoralea cleome, is a plant species in the Cleomaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Cleome parviflora subsp. psoraleifolia include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
